name: Partners Credit & Verification Solutions
description_short: B2B data and verification services provider for mortgage lenders, credit unions, and bankers offering customized credit reports, income verification, and borrower verification tools.
description_long:
Partners Credit & Verification Solutions is a technology-driven service provider that specializes in borrower data and verification solutions for the lending industry. The company serves thousands of employers, landlords, mortgage brokers, bankers, credit unions, and lenders across the United States, positioning itself as an essential partner in the loan origination and closing process.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including customizable credit reports, income verification transcripts directly from the IRS, employment verification, fraud investigation tools (FIT Report), and borrower verification reports. Their offerings span the entire lending lifecycle—from initial credit pulls to pre-close reports and final credit reviews. They also provide Day 1 Certainty solutions designed to give lenders freedom from reps and warrants, along with undisclosed debt monitoring and tax/SSN verifications.

Partners distinguishes itself through customized workflow solutions and proprietary technology that adapts to client needs rather than forcing clients to adapt to their processes. The company emphasizes U.S.-based customer service professionals, transparency, and service level agreements. They highlight the ability to integrate multiple verification services into a single streamlined workflow, reducing the number of third-party vendors lenders must engage with.

As a B2B service provider rather than a direct-to-consumer lender, Partners operates in a specialized niche serving institutional lending clients. Their value proposition depends entirely on their ability to deliver accurate data, fast processing, and reliable customer service to professional lending teams. The company appears well-established and credible within the lending industry but is not accessible to individual consumers seeking personal credit or lending products.
address: 55 W Monroe St Suite 1655, Chicago, IL 60603

company_info.headquarters: 55 W Monroe St Suite 1655, Chicago, IL 60603

pros: Comprehensive integrated suite covering credit reports, income verification, employment verification, and fraud detection in one workflow
Direct IRS transcript integration for income verification with fast and flexible online ordering
Customizable credit reports and product bundling capabilities tailored to specific loan packages
U.S.-based customer service team with option for service level agreements to ensure accountability
Day 1 Certainty product designed to provide lenders freedom from reps and warrants
Serves thousands of established clients including mortgage brokers, credit unions, and major lenders
Proprietary technology allowing customized workflows rather than forcing clients into standardized processes
cons: B2B-only service—not accessible to individual consumers; requires institutional lending account
Pricing structure not transparent on website; requires proposal request and direct contact
Limited public information about specific turnaround times, accuracy rates, or compliance certifications
No mention of FCRA compliance details, data security standards, or audit results on website
Relies heavily on sales/proposal process rather than self-service pricing, limiting transparency for potential clients
best_for: Mortgage brokers and banks seeking centralized borrower verification and data services
Credit unions needing customized credit reporting and income verification workflows
Large lenders wanting to reduce third-party vendor relationships and streamline loan origination
Lending institutions requiring fraud detection and undisclosed debt monitoring capabilities
diagnosis: Partners Credit & Verification Solutions is exclusively a B2B service provider for institutional lenders, not a consumer-facing company. Best suited for mortgage brokers, bankers, credit unions, and large lending institutions seeking integrated borrower data and verification solutions; individual consumers cannot use this service directly.
services: Customizable credit reports with pre-close options
Borrower verification reports with electronic review invitations
Tax and Social Security number verification
